summary: Zara owner Inditex reported a data breach involving a third party. The company said latest breach exposed transaction-related information but no personal details.

summary: Nothing has taken down the Warp app from Android and Chrome soon after the launch. The company is yet to share a reason for the removal of the app.

title: Anthropic CEO to meet White House chief of staff amid Pentagon AI dispute: Report
summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei is slated to ​meet White House ​chief of staff Susie Wiles on ​Friday, in a sign of a breakthrough in the artificial intelligence startup's dispute with the Pentagon, Axios reported.

title: Anthropic talks to EU, including on its cyber security models, Commission says
summary: US-based ​artificial ​intelligence company Anthropic is ​currently in discussion with the European Commission on ‌its ⁠different ⁠models, including its ​cyber security ones, which are not ​yet available in the EU, the ​Commission said ⁠on Friday.

title: Walmart's Flipkart plans foray into India's ticketing market as live events boom, sources say
summary: Flipkart is set to enter India's booming entertainment market. The e-commerce giant plans to sell movie and concert tickets. This move pits Flipkart against established players like BookMyShow. The company is also piloting food delivery services. These expansions signal Flipkart's aggressive growth

title: Canva unveils new platform, transitions to ‘AI platform with design tools’ from ‘design platform with AI tools’
summary: Design giant Canva unveiled its AI-native platform, Canva 2.0, powered by its own models. This shift transforms it into an AI platform with design tools, aiming for the next generation of users. The company also introduced a new AI Pass for enhanced AI capabilities.

title: Life after Leonid Radvinsky: OnlyFans nears minority stake deal valuing it at $3 billion
summary: OnlyFans is close to selling a minority stake. The deal could value the adult content platform at over three billion dollars. San Francisco-based fund Architect Capital is in advanced discussions. An agreement might be reached next month. The sale follows the death of owner Leonid Radvinsky.

title: BigBasket appoints ex-Google exec Arpit Jaiswal as chief growth officer
summary: BigBasket has appointed Arpit Jaiswal, a former executive of Google India, as its new chief growth officer. summary: D2C fragrance brand Fifth Sense has raised Rs 6.3 crore in pre-seed funding led by OTP Ventures. The startup, founded by IIM Kozhikode alumni, offers premium, climate-adapted fragrances. This funding round saw participation from Sadev Ventures, ISV Capital, and angel investors, signaling growing inv

title: India smartphone shipments fall to 6-year low in Q1 amid price hikes: Counterpoint Research
summary: India's smartphone shipments experienced a 3% year-on-year decline in Q1 2026, reaching a six-year low due to cost pressures and price hikes. Analysts predict further declines, with Vivo leading the market share. Google emerged as the fastest-growing premium brand, boosted by AI features.

title: Wipro attrition falls to 13.8%, headcount inches up by 136
summary: Wipro reported a slight decrease in attrition to 13.8% and a significant slowdown in hiring, adding only 136 employees in Q4 FY26.
